headline: ‘Citibank and Amex Have Screwed an 85-Year-Old Widow’: Dave Ramsey on $45,000 in Credit Card Debt With No Assets
summary: On a recent episode of The Ramsey Show, a caller named Michelle from New York described a situation many adult children quietly dread. After her father passed away in July, she discovered her 85-year-old widowed mother had accumulated $45,000 across 5 credit cards, including American Express and two Citibank cards. Her mother lives on Social ... ‘Citibank and Amex Have Screwed an 85-Year-Old Widow’: Dave Ramsey on $45,000 in Credit Card Debt With No Assets
